findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "start_draft" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Open a composable draft. Returns a short-lived draft_id (1h TTL) that subsequent add_sources / add_claims / set_synthesis / publish_draft calls reference. No au…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
